channel.title: Divyanshu Dhruv | 🌌🏮
channel.description: One pixel at a time. Simple code, complex logic.

item.title: Portfolio Launch - Divyanshu Dhruv
item.description: Personal portfolio website showcasing full-stack development projects, experience, and technical skills. Built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript.

item.title: Covane Space 🌌 - Personal Project
item.description: A modern space-themed web application showcasing advanced React patterns and creative UI design. Features interactive components and responsive design.

item.title: Percept Network 🏮 - Network Project
item.description: Network visualization and management platform built with modern web technologies. Features real-time data processing and intuitive user interface.

item.title: Full-Stack Developer - 5+ Years Experience (coding since 2020)
item.description: Experienced full-stack developer specializing in Next.js, React, and TypeScript. Passionate about creating polished, user-centric web applications.

item.title: Technical Stack Update - Modern Web Technologies
item.description: Current tech stack includes Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and modern development tools. Focused on performance and user experience.

item.title: GitHub Activity - Open Source Contributions
item.description: Active GitHub user contributing to open source projects and maintaining personal repositories. Focus on web development tools and educational content.
